title: Russell Hobbs Steam Genie 2in1 Handheld Clothes Steamer with Ironing Option, Ready to Use in 1m, Power Indicator, 150ml Removable Tank, 3 Attachments, 10m Steam Time, 1400-1700W, 28370
features: POWERFUL PERFORMANCE & ONE TOUCH TECHNOLOGY - The Steam Genie 2 in 1 simplifies ironing with its 1700W power and One Temperature Technology. It's safe for all fabrics, so there is no need to adjust temperatures.

FAST HEAT-UP TIME: The Steam iron provides quick wrinkle removal with a 60-second heat-up time and 15g steam burst. The fast heat-up time allows instant steaming, while the powerful steam burst feature speeds up the ironing process.
CERAMIC SOLEPLATE - Gives you even heat distribution whilst ironing and allows a smooth glide over materials, eliminating creases for effortless ironing.
Kills up to 99.9% Bacteria- The Steam Genie 2 in 1 kills 99.9% of bacteria in 60 seconds (2 types of bacteria on 3 surfaces. Laboratory tested.)

150ml Water Tank Capacity - Always have plenty of water for steam, thanks to the 150ml Water Tank Capacity on the Steam Genie 2 in 1.and provides over 10 minutes of steaming time per tank for fresher, hygienic fabrics while removing creases.
Accessories - Delicate fabric brush, padding accessory, heat-resistant storage cover.
description: From the manufacturer About The Brand Russell Hobbs was founded in the UK in 1952 by Bill Russell and Peter Hobbs, whose combined design and engineering flair allowed them to launch a company that remains a leading brand to this day. Over the years, Russell Hobbs has built up a legacy of design and innovation that placed the brand at the heart of the consumer’s home. The first automatic switch off kettle, the first automatic coffee maker and even the first plastic kettle were all Russell Hobbs Innovations. Russell Hobbs 2-in-1 Steam Genie, 28370 Ready for Anything! Smooth away creases and freshen-up fabrics with the Steam Genie 2 in 1 with a Steam and Iron Feature. The Quick 60-Second Heat-Up Time and One Temperature Technology makes it fast and effortless to use – and once you’re done, rest it on its heal until it cools. Kills up to 99.9% of Bacteria in 60 Seconds* enjoy hygienic fabrics and tackle stubborn creases with the 20g Steam Output with Steam Trigger Lock. *Tested on 2 types of bacteria on 3 surfaces. Laboratory tested. 2 in 1 Design: Steaming and Ironing Feature No Ironing Board Required! One Temperature Technology Destroys up to 99.9% Bacteria in 60 Seconds* 2 in 1 Design: Steaming and Ironing Feature The Steam Genie 2 in 1 has been designed to cleverly combine both a Steaming and Ironing Feature . Bringing you the best of both, enjoy the freedom of steaming and the ability to iron out those tougher creases when needed. Steaming Feature: Quickly tackle creases in your outfit, or refresh fabrics all around the home without the need for an ironing board Ironing Feature: Lay your garment onto a flat surface to quickly iron out more stubborn creases One Temperature Technology Ironing just got easier! The Steam Genie 2 in 1 has One Temperature Technology that’s safe for use, on all iron friendly fabrics. Designed to save you time worrying about whether you have the right temperature for your garment, as the Steam Genie 2 in 1 is ready for anything. Accessories Delicate – Reduces the possibility of damage to fabrics such as silk and lace. Upholstery - Deodorises, refreshes and cleans larger materials such as bedding, mattresses, curtains, soft toys, sofas and more. Fabric - Opens up the fibres in fabrics, allowing the steam to better penetrate the material. This is great for thicker materials like coats and can also help to remove pilling. Travel/Storage Heat Resistant Bag – Can be used as a mat to rest the steamer on or as a bag for convenient storage. Kills up to 99.9% Bacteria in 60 Seconds* Remove bacteria for fresher, more hygienic fabrics whilst you steam and iron, with the Steam Genie 2 in 1. Designed to Kills up to 99.9% of Bacteria in 60 Seconds* , you can enjoy cleaner fabrics around the home. *Tested on 2 types of bacteria on 3 surfaces. Laboratory tested. Product Specifications One Temperature Technology Quick 60 Second Heat-Up Time 1700W Ceramic Soleplate 150ml Water Tank Capacity 20g Steam Output with Steam Trigger Lock Over 7 Minutes Steaming Time 3m Power Cord with Cord Storage Power and Temperature Indicator Light Auto-Shut Off
